register.title: Register as a Sangoma
register.subtitle: Join our directory of trusted traditional healers. Your profile will be reviewed before going live.
register.name: Full Name
register.emailNote: Not shown publicly — for verification only.
register.bioPlaceholder: Tell people about your practice, training, and healing philosophy…
register.reviewNotice: Applications are reviewed within 3–5 business days. You'll receive no email — check back to see if your profile is live.
register.successMessage: Thank you for registering. We will review your application and add you to our directory shortly.
register.pendingNote: Your profile will appear once approved by our team.

home.heroDesc: Connect with trusted sangomas across South Africa and discover traditional herbal remedies passed down through generations.

findSangoma.title: Find a Sangoma
findSangoma.desc: Locate trusted traditional healers near you, verified by the community.

herbRemedies.title: Herb Remedies
herbRemedies.desc: Explore a library of traditional recipes you can prepare at home.

symptomGuide.title: Symptom Guide
symptomGuide.desc: Describe what you're feeling and receive herb recommendations.

home.ctaDesc: Tell us your symptoms and our guide will suggest traditional remedies — and connect you with a sangoma if needed.

sangomas.noResults: No sangomas found for your search.

recipes.title: Herb Remedies

recommender.title: Symptom Guide
recommender.description: Select what you are experiencing and we will suggest traditional herbs to help.
recommender.disclaimer: These remedies complement — they do not replace — professional care.
recommender.deeperConsult: For a deeper consultation with a traditional healer:
recommender.guideNote: This guide is educational and based on traditional knowledge. Always consult a qualified practitioner.
